failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: Dm4avM
- Response violates schema
null is not of type "string"
Schema at /properties/createdAt:
{ "type": "string", "format": "date-time", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
null
[201] Created:
`{"id":320,"name":"Napoli Centrale","address":"123","phone":"+351912345678","createdAt":null}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Napoli Centrale", "address": 123, "phone": "+351912345678"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias

1. Test Case ID: Dm4avM
- Response violates schema
null is not of type "string"
Schema at /properties/createdAt:
{ "type": "string", "format": "date-time", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
null
[201] Created:
`{"id":320,"name":"Napoli Centrale","address":"123","phone":"+351912345678","createdAt":null}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Napoli Centrale", "address": 123, "phone": "+351912345678"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias
2. Test Case ID: fpCuB1
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-09T04:36:15.067151741" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /properties/timestamp:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Time when the error was generated", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12.345" }
Value:
"2026-04-09T04:36:15.067151741"
[400] Bad Request:
`{"error":"Bad Request","message":"name: must not be blank","timestamp":"2026-04-09T04:36:15.067151741","status":400}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"address": 123, "phone": "+351912345678"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias
3. Test Case ID: msV3ep
- API accepted schema-violating request
Invalid data should have been rejected Expected: 400, 401, 403, 404, 406, 422, 428, 5xx Invalid component: in body - object with invalid 'phone' value: Incorrect type
[201] Created:
`{"id":321,"name":"Napoli Centrale","address":"123","phone":null,"createdAt":null}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Napoli Centrale", "address": 123, "phone": null}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias
4. Test Case ID: aHVtrz
- Response violates schema
null is not of type "string"
Schema at /properties/address:
{ "type": "string", "description": "Street address", "example": 123 }
Value:
null
[201] Created:
`{"id":324,"name":"Napoli Centrale","address":null,"phone":"+351912345678","createdAt":null}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Napoli Centrale", "address": null, "phone": "+351912345678"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias

null is not of type "string"

{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Time when the error was generated", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12.345" }
Value:
"2026-04-09T04:36:15.067151741"

`{"error":"Bad Request","message":"name: must not be blank","timestamp":"2026-04-09T04:36:15.067151741","status":400}`

curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"address": 123, "phone": "+351912345678"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias
3. Test Case ID: msV3ep

Invalid data should have been rejected Expected: 400, 401, 403, 404, 406, 422, 428, 5xx Invalid component: in body - object with invalid 'phone' value: Incorrect type

`{"id":321,"name":"Napoli Centrale","address":"123","phone":null,"createdAt":null}`

null is not of type "string"

5. Test Case ID: jCaIK5
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[400] Bad Request:
`{"error":"Bad Request","message":"name: must not be blank","timestamp":"2026-04-09T04:36:23.812127311","status":400}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": ""}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias

1. Test Case ID: oIvGR9
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-09T04:33:16" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /components/schemas/Pizzeria/properties/createdAt:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
"2026-04-09T04:33:16"
[200] OK:
`[{"id":2,"name":"Roma Antica","address":"Avenida da Liberdade 22, Lisboa","phone":"+351 210 200 200","createdAt":"2026-04-09T04:33:16"},{"id":3,"name":"Sicilia Slice","address":"Praça do Mercado 5, Coimbra","phone":"+351 239 300 300","createdAt":"2026-04-09T04:33:16"},{"id":4,"name":"ZAP","address":"688 Zaproxy Ridge","phone":"9999999999","createdAt":"2026-04-09T04:34:16"},{"id":5,"name":"http://www.google.com/","address":"688 Zaproxy Ridge","phone":"9999999999","createdAt":"2026-04-09T04:34:17"},{"id":6,"n // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias

1. Test Case ID: oIvGR9
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-09T04:33:16" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /components/schemas/Pizzeria/properties/createdAt:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
"2026-04-09T04:33:16"
[200] OK:
`[{"id":2,"name":"Roma Antica","address":"Avenida da Liberdade 22, Lisboa","phone":"+351 210 200 200","createdAt":"2026-04-09T04:33:16"},{"id":3,"name":"Sicilia Slice","address":"Praça do Mercado 5, Coimbra","phone":"+351 239 300 300","createdAt":"2026-04-09T04:33:16"},{"id":4,"name":"ZAP","address":"688 Zaproxy Ridge","phone":"9999999999","createdAt":"2026-04-09T04:34:16"},{"id":5,"name":"http://www.google.com/","address":"688 Zaproxy Ridge","phone":"9999999999","createdAt":"2026-04-09T04:34:17"},{"id":6,"n // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias

1. Test Case ID: SOLEWt
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-09T04:36:13.561847234" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /properties/timestamp:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Time when the error was generated", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12.345" }
Value:
"2026-04-09T04:36:13.561847234"
[404] Not Found:
`{"error":"Not Found","message":"Pizzeria with id 1 was not found.","timestamp":"2026-04-09T04:36:13.561847234","status":404}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Margherita", "ingredients": "Tomato, mozzarella, basil", "pizzeriaId": 1, "price": 12.5, "size": "medium", "isAvailable": true, "photoUrl": "https://example.com/pizzas/margherita.jpg"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzas

- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[400] Bad Request:
`{"error":"Bad Request","message":"name: must not be blank","timestamp":"2026-04-09T04:36:30.774409358","status":400}`
Reproduce with:

3. Test Case ID: s8GWMb
- Response violates schema
null is not of type "string"
Schema at /properties/createdAt:
{ "type": "string", "format": "date-time", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
null
[201] Created:
`{"id":7,"name":"Db","ingredients":null,"price":0.0,"size":"large","isAvailable":true,"photoUrl":null,"createdAt":null,"pizzeriaId":272}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Db", "pizzeriaId": 272, "price": 0.0, "size": "large"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzas

1. Test Case ID: T0lMI2
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-09T04:36:14.815764432" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /properties/timestamp:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Time when the error was generated", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12.345" }
Value:
"2026-04-09T04:36:14.815764432"
[404] Not Found:
`{"error":"Not Found","message":"Pizza with id 1 was not found.","timestamp":"2026-04-09T04:36:14.815764432","status":404}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X PUT -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Margherita", "ingredients": "Tomato, mozzarella, basil", "pizzeriaId": 1, "price": 12.5, "size": "medium", "isAvailable": true, "photoUrl": "https://example.com/pizzas/margherita.jpg"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzas/1

null

4. Test Case ID: HqmnHQ
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx Hint: The request body contains 4 additional properties not defined in the schema (``, `î𹲏`, `~3𑸌𰙠Ð󧢌򀭦ZN¥$ö` and 1 more). The server likely rejects unexpected fields. Add `additionalProperties: false` to your schema to prevent this.
[400] Bad Request:
`{"timestamp":"2026-04-09T04:36:50.695Z","status":400,"error":"Bad Request","path":"/api/pizzerias/116"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X PUT -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "http://www.google.com:80/", "phone": "", "": {}, "address": "\udae1\udc2a\u00e0e\"\\X", "\udbc1\udd9b\u0003": null, "\u0084\u00ee\ud8a7\udc8f": {"\u00f6": [[]]}, "\u0095~3\ud807\ude0c\ud881\ude60\u00d0\udb5e\udc8c\ud9c2\udf66ZN\u00a5$\u00f6": [[{"x": []}, {"\u00cd\u00ea\u0018\u00a7": false}, ["/", {"__main__": false}, {"\u00f5E": false, "\u0000\ud817\uddc2": null, "\udb03\udc0e\u0013\u0003\u00d4": false}]], [], {"\u00f8\u00e6\udae2\udc8f\u00cc": "\u0006.\ud949\udd22\u0013x\u00da\u009d\u0005\uda69\udd01\u00fe\u00f8\u001d\u00e2f\udb47\ude66\u00f7\u00bb]\u00cf\u00af", "\ud9b3\ude0aw\u0094\uda1d\udc86\u00cbL'"'"'\u00d4\ud87f\ude61/": "\u00eb\u0010\u00dd`"}]}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias/116

1. Test Case ID: DhGEK1
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-09T04:33:16" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /components/schemas/Pizza/properties/createdAt:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
"2026-04-09T04:33:16"
- API accepted schema-violating request
Invalid data should have been rejected Expected: 400, 401, 403, 404, 406, 422, 428, 5xx Invalid component: parameter `pizzeriaId` in query - incorrect type
[200] OK:
`[{"id":3,"name":"Pepperoni","ingredients":"Tomato, mozzarella, pepperoni","price":11.00,"size":"large","isAvailable":true,"photoUrl":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1513104890138-7c749659a591","createdAt":"2026-04-09T04:33:16","pizzeriaId":2},{"id":4,"name":"Quattro Formaggi","ingredients":"Mozzarella, gorgonzola, parmesan, provolone","price":12.40,"size":"medium","isAvailable":true,"photoUrl":null,"createdAt":"2026-04-09T04:33:16","pizzeriaId":2},{"id":5,"name":"Vegetariana","ingredients":"Tomato, mozza // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET 'http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzas?pizzeriaId='

1. Test Case ID: DhGEK1
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-09T04:33:16" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /components/schemas/Pizza/properties/createdAt:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
"2026-04-09T04:33:16"
- API accepted schema-violating request
Invalid data should have been rejected Expected: 400, 401, 403, 404, 406, 422, 428, 5xx Invalid component: parameter `pizzeriaId` in query - incorrect type
[200] OK:
`[{"id":3,"name":"Pepperoni","ingredients":"Tomato, mozzarella, pepperoni","price":11.00,"size":"large","isAvailable":true,"photoUrl":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1513104890138-7c749659a591","createdAt":"2026-04-09T04:33:16","pizzeriaId":2},{"id":4,"name":"Quattro Formaggi","ingredients":"Mozzarella, gorgonzola, parmesan, provolone","price":12.40,"size":"medium","isAvailable":true,"photoUrl":null,"createdAt":"2026-04-09T04:33:16","pizzeriaId":2},{"id":5,"name":"Vegetariana","ingredients":"Tomato, mozza // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET 'http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzas?pizzeriaId='

1. Test Case ID: mELtrv
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-09T04:36:14.864390046" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /properties/timestamp:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Time when the error was generated", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12.345" }
Value:
"2026-04-09T04:36:14.864390046"
[404] Not Found:
`{"error":"Not Found","message":"Pizza with id 1 was not found.","timestamp":"2026-04-09T04:36:14.864390046","status":404}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzas/1
